cadences.name: daily_inbox_triage
actions: Check all monitored inboxes (email, Slack, portal submissions)
Categorize each item: urgent / action-required / FYI / spam
Create or update tasks in the task tracker
Flag items requiring escalation to the owner
cadences.owner: Nova agent (automated triage); human review for urgent items
cadences.verification: Receipt generated at reports/cadence/daily-triage-<date>.md with item count and category breakdown

cadences.name: weekly_credit_command_center_review
actions: Review all active credit report disputes and their status
Check for new credit report data (Experian, TransUnion, Equifax)
Update violation scorecards for each active case
Generate weekly progress summary
Flag any deadlines or response windows at risk
cadences.verification: Updated scorecards exist; weekly summary written to reports/cadence/credit-review-<date>.md

cadences.name: weekly_social_media_music_content_sprint
actions: Review social media analytics from the past week
Select and repurpose music content for social posts
Schedule posts for the upcoming week
Update content calendar and platform profile trackers
Log growth metrics
cadences.owner: Sigma agent (content); human approval for publishing
cadences.verification: Content calendar updated; posts scheduled; growth metrics logged in social-media/analytics/

cadences.name: weekly_repo_smoke_check
actions: Run python scripts/smoke/repo_truth_check.py
Run python scripts/smoke/verify_aios_output.py
Run pytest (if test suite exists and is stable)
Check for any uncommitted changes or stale branches
Generate weekly repo health report
cadences.verification: Smoke check exit code 0; report written to reports/cadence/repo-smoke-<date>.md

cadences.name: monthly_trust_admin_records_audit
actions: Audit all trust-related documents (Howard Trust, IKE Solutions)
Verify evidence manifests are current for all active matters
Check that all admin records (invoices, receipts, filings) are filed
Identify any missing or stale records
Generate monthly audit report
cadences.owner: Human (admin/legal); agent support for data gathering
cadences.verification: Audit report written to reports/cadence/monthly-audit-<date>.md with checklist of all verified records

cadences.name: monthly_public_records_evidence_archive_update
actions: Check for new public records relevant to active matters
Download and archive any new evidence documents
Update evidence manifests with new entries
Verify chain of custody for all archived evidence
Generate evidence archive update report
cadences.verification: Evidence manifests updated; archive report written to reports/cadence/evidence-archive-<date>.md
